title: 「動詞比較句：Verb + more / less than」
titleZh: 動詞比較句：Verb + more / less than

source.file: Sentence Structure 88 -「動詞比較句：Verb + more _ less than」.pdf
omissions: The PDF presents the Important Rules explanations in Traditional Chinese; their English fields are faithful editorial translations.

formula: A + verb + more / less than + B

formulas.formula: A + verb + more / less than + B

formulas.labelZh: 比較兩個動作、對象或選擇
formulas.labelEn: Compare two actions, objects or choices
formulas.formula: Subject + verb + X + more / less than + Y

formulas.labelZh: 比較依賴、關注、投資等程度
formulas.labelEn: Compare degrees of dependence, attention or investment
formulas.formula: Subject + verb + more / less + preposition + X + than + preposition + Y

formulas.labelZh: 比較動作的頻率或方式
formulas.labelEn: Compare the frequency or manner of actions
formulas.formula: Subject + verb + more / less + adverb + than + comparison

example: Local standards matter more than private comfort.
exampleZh: 當地標準比個人舒適更重要。

examples.en: Local standards matter more than private comfort.
examples.zh: 當地標準比個人舒適更重要。

examples.en: I value honesty more than popularity.
examples.zh: 我重視誠實多於受歡迎。

examples.en: The team depends more on preparation than on luck.
examples.zh: 球隊依賴準備多於運氣。
examples.highlight: depends more on preparation than on luck

examples.en: People remember stories more easily than long lists of facts.
examples.zh: 人們記住故事通常比記住一長串事實容易。
examples.highlight: remember stories more easily than long lists of facts

rules.zh: more 表示較多或較高程度；less 表示較少或較低程度。
rules.en: More indicates a greater amount or degree, while less indicates a smaller amount or degree.
examples: care more: 更加關心
depend more: 更加依賴
spend less: 花費較少
worry less: 擔心得較少

rules.zh: than 前後的內容應保持同類，例如名詞與名詞比較，或動名詞短語與動名詞短語比較。
rules.en: Keep the content before and after than parallel, such as comparing one noun with another or one gerund phrase with another.
examples: Correct: I value honesty more than popularity.
Correct: Maya cares more about doing the work well than about finishing first.
Incorrect: I value honesty more than being popular is important.

rules.zh: 如動詞後面需要介詞，通常應在 than 後重複介詞，令比較關係更清楚。
rules.en: If the verb requires a preposition, normally repeat the preposition after than to make the comparison clearer.
examples: The company invests more in training than in advertising.
The team depends more on preparation than on luck.

rules.zh: 比較動作的頻率或方式時，可以加入副詞，例如 more often than、more frequently than、more easily than、more clearly than 和 more effectively than。
rules.en: Add an adverb when comparing the frequency or manner of actions, for example more often than, more frequently than, more easily than, more clearly than and more effectively than.

rules.zh: 不要使用雙重比較。不要寫 more better than；可寫 matters more than 或 is better than。
rules.en: Do not use a double comparative. Avoid more better than; use matters more than or is better than.
examples: Incorrect: This matters more better than that.
Correct: This matters more than that.
Correct: This is better than that.

rules.zh: 本課集中練習「動詞比較」，而不是一般形容詞比較。動詞比較能直接說明主語採取甚麼態度或行動。
rules.en: This lesson focuses on verb comparison rather than ordinary adjective comparison. A verb comparative directly states the attitude or action taken by the subject.
examples: Adjective comparison: Safety is more important than appearance.
Verb comparison: The school prioritises safety more than appearance.

benefits.zh: 清楚指出哪一項事物得到較多重視。這個句型可以清楚指出哪一項事物得到較多重視、關注或資源。
benefits.en: It shows exactly which thing receives more attention. This structure clearly shows which idea, action or choice is more important.

benefits.zh: 令比較更主動和直接。你不只可以說某件事「較重要」，還可以直接說明某人或機構更重視、依賴、信任或投資哪一方面。
benefits.en: It makes comparisons more active and direct. Instead of only saying that one thing is more important, you can explain what a person or organisation actually does.
examples: Safety is more important to the school than appearance.
The school prioritises safety more than appearance.

benefits.zh: 合併兩個相關意思。你可以把兩個相關意思合併，不需要分開寫成兩句。
benefits.en: It combines two related ideas. Instead of writing two separate sentences, you can join the comparison in one sentence.
examples: Before: Mia enjoys reading. She does not enjoy gaming as much.
After: Mia enjoys reading more than gaming.

benefits.zh: 幫助解釋選擇和決定。當你需要解釋優先次序、開支、喜好、信任或判斷時，這個句型十分實用。
benefits.en: It helps you explain choices and decisions. This structure is useful when explaining priorities, spending, preferences, trust and judgement.

benefits.zh: 提供實用的口語和寫作框架。掌握這個框架後，可以較快組織口語答案、作文論點、報告和簡報內容。
benefits.en: It provides a useful speaking and writing frame. Once you know the pattern, you can quickly insert your own ideas.
examples: I value ___ more than ___.
We depend more on ___ than on ___.
The government should invest more in ___ than in ___.

sourceOmissions: English Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations because the PDF supplies those explanations in Traditional Chinese.

en: Rewrite each sentence using a verb comparative with more … than or less … than.
Preserve the original meaning and comparison.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用含有 more … than 或 less … than 的動詞比較句改寫以下句子。
答案必須保留原句的意思及比較關係。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Local standards are more important than private comfort.
questions.promptZh: 當地標準比個人舒適更重要。
questions.answer: Local standards matter more than private comfort.
questions.answerZh: 當地標準比個人舒適更重要。
questions.highlight: Local standards matter more than private comfort.

questions.prompt: Honesty is more important to me than popularity.
questions.promptZh: 對我而言，誠實比受歡迎更重要。
questions.answer: I value honesty more than popularity.
questions.answerZh: 我重視誠實多於受歡迎。
questions.highlight: I value honesty more than popularity.

questions.prompt: Mia enjoys both reading and gaming. Reading is her stronger preference.
questions.promptZh: 米婭既喜歡閱讀，也喜歡打機。她較偏愛閱讀。
questions.answer: Mia enjoys reading more than gaming.
questions.answerZh: 米婭喜歡閱讀多於打機。
questions.highlight: Mia enjoys reading more than gaming.

questions.prompt: Facts seem more trustworthy to Ben than rumours.
questions.promptZh: 對本而言，事實比傳言更可信。
questions.answer: Ben trusts facts more than rumours.
questions.answerZh: 本相信事實多於傳言。
questions.highlight: Ben trusts facts more than rumours.

questions.prompt: Clean water is more necessary for us than luxury goods.
questions.promptZh: 對我們而言，潔淨食水比奢侈品更不可或缺。
questions.answer: We need clean water more than luxury goods.
questions.answerZh: 我們需要潔淨食水多於奢侈品。
questions.highlight: We need clean water more than luxury goods.

questions.prompt: The children have a stronger liking for outdoor games than for screen time.
questions.promptZh: 孩子們較喜歡戶外遊戲，而不是螢幕活動。
questions.answer: The children like outdoor games more than screen time.
questions.answerZh: 孩子們喜歡戶外遊戲多於螢幕活動。
questions.highlight: The children like outdoor games more than screen time.

questions.prompt: Sarah misses both her family and her old neighbourhood. She feels a stronger sense of homesickness for her family.
questions.promptZh: 莎拉既掛念家人，也掛念以前居住的社區。她對家人的思念更深。
questions.answer: Sarah misses her family more than her old neighbourhood.
questions.answerZh: 莎拉掛念家人多於以前居住的社區。
questions.highlight: Sarah misses her family more than her old neighbourhood.

questions.prompt: Patience is more necessary for this job than physical strength.
questions.promptZh: 這份工作需要耐性，多於需要體力。
questions.answer: This job requires patience more than physical strength.
questions.answerZh: 這份工作需要耐性多於體力。
questions.highlight: This job requires patience more than physical strength.

questions.prompt: The school gives greater priority to safety than to appearance.
questions.promptZh: 學校給予安全的優先程度高於外觀。
questions.answer: The school prioritises safety more than appearance.
questions.answerZh: 學校重視安全多於外觀。
questions.highlight: The school prioritises safety more than appearance.

questions.prompt: Speed is useful. However, good planning is more important.
questions.promptZh: 速度固然有用，但良好規劃更重要。
questions.answer: Good planning matters more than speed.
questions.answerZh: 良好規劃比速度更重要。
questions.highlight: Good planning matters more than speed.

questions.prompt: I use the library frequently. I rarely use the sports centre.
questions.promptZh: 我經常使用圖書館，但很少使用體育中心。
questions.answer: I use the library more often than I use the sports centre.
questions.answerZh: 我使用圖書館的次數比使用體育中心多。
questions.highlight: I use the library more often than I use the sports centre.

questions.prompt: Chloe does not spend as much practice time on writing as on speaking.
questions.promptZh: 克洛伊練習寫作的時間不及練習說話的時間多。
questions.answer: Chloe practises speaking more than writing.
questions.answerZh: 克洛伊練習說話多於練習寫作。
questions.highlight: Chloe practises speaking more than writing.

questions.prompt: Leo checks the weather forecast every morning. He checks social media only occasionally.
questions.promptZh: 里奧每天早上查看天氣預報，但只會偶爾查看社交媒體。
questions.answer: Leo checks the weather forecast more often than he checks social media.
questions.answerZh: 里奧查看天氣預報的次數比查看社交媒體多。
questions.highlight: Leo checks the weather forecast more often than he checks social media.

questions.prompt: My health causes my parents greater concern than my grades.
questions.promptZh: 與我的成績相比，我的健康令父母更加擔心。
questions.answer: My parents worry more about my health than about my grades.
questions.answerZh: 父母擔心我的健康多於擔心我的成績。
questions.highlight: My parents worry more about my health than about my grades.

questions.prompt: The team’s dependence on preparation is greater than its dependence on luck.
questions.promptZh: 球隊對準備的依賴程度高於對運氣的依賴。
questions.answer: The team depends more on preparation than on luck.
questions.answerZh: 球隊依賴準備多於運氣。
questions.highlight: The team depends more on preparation than on luck.

questions.prompt: Residents do not complain about traffic as much as they complain about noise.
questions.promptZh: 居民對交通的投訴不及對噪音的投訴多。
questions.answer: Residents complain more about noise than about traffic.
questions.answerZh: 居民對噪音的投訴多於對交通的投訴。
questions.highlight: Residents complain more about noise than about traffic.

questions.prompt: The company’s investment in training is greater than its investment in advertising.
questions.promptZh: 公司在培訓方面的投資高於廣告方面的投資。
questions.answer: The company invests more in training than in advertising.
questions.answerZh: 公司投資在培訓方面的資源多於廣告。
questions.highlight: The company invests more in training than in advertising.

questions.prompt: Her teacher’s advice is more valuable to Ava than advice from online influencers.
questions.promptZh: 對艾娃而言，老師的意見比網上意見領袖的意見更有價值。
questions.answer: Ava values her teacher’s advice more than advice from online influencers.
questions.answerZh: 艾娃重視老師的意見多於網上意見領袖的意見。
questions.highlight: Ava values her teacher’s advice more than advice from online influencers.

questions.prompt: Mistakes are a greater source of learning for us than easy success.
questions.promptZh: 對我們而言，錯誤比輕易取得的成功帶來更多學習機會。
questions.answer: We learn more from mistakes than from easy success.
questions.answerZh: 我們從錯誤中學到的東西比從輕易取得的成功中更多。
questions.highlight: We learn more from mistakes than from easy success.

questions.prompt: Which group finds the museum more appealing, families or young travellers? Families do.
questions.promptZh: 哪一個群體認為這間博物館較吸引：家庭還是年輕旅客？答案是家庭。
questions.answer: The museum appeals more to families than to young travellers.
questions.answerZh: 這間博物館對家庭的吸引力高於對年輕旅客的吸引力。
questions.highlight: The museum appeals more to families than to young travellers.

questions.prompt: I do not trust short comments as much as detailed reports.
questions.promptZh: 我對簡短評論的信任不及對詳細報告的信任。
questions.answer: I trust detailed reports more than short comments.
questions.answerZh: 我信任詳細報告多於簡短評論。
questions.highlight: I trust detailed reports more than short comments.

questions.prompt: Prevention receives more of the doctor’s attention than short-term treatment.
questions.promptZh: 醫生放在預防方面的注意力多於短期治療。
questions.answer: The doctor focuses more on prevention than on short-term treatment.
questions.answerZh: 醫生較重視預防，而不是短期治療。
questions.highlight: The doctor focuses more on prevention than on short-term treatment.

questions.prompt: Ethan’s spending on books is higher than his spending on clothes.
questions.promptZh: 伊森花在書本上的金錢多於花在衣服上的金錢。
questions.answer: Ethan spends more on books than on clothes.
questions.answerZh: 伊森花在書本上的金錢多於衣服。
questions.highlight: Ethan spends more on books than on clothes.

questions.prompt: The city’s dependence on private cars is lower than it was ten years ago.
questions.promptZh: 這座城市對私家車的依賴程度低於十年前。
questions.answer: The city relies less on private cars than it did ten years ago.
questions.answerZh: 這座城市目前對私家車的依賴少於十年前。
questions.highlight: The city relies less on private cars than it did ten years ago.

questions.prompt: What receives more discussion in our class, ideas or test scores? Ideas do.
questions.promptZh: 我們班較常討論哪一項：想法還是測驗分數？答案是想法。
questions.answer: Our class discusses ideas more than test scores.
questions.answerZh: 我們班討論想法多於測驗分數。
questions.highlight: Our class discusses ideas more than test scores.

questions.prompt: For Maya, doing the work well is more important than finishing first.
questions.promptZh: 對瑪雅而言，把工作做好比第一個完成更重要。
questions.answer: Maya cares more about doing the work well than about finishing first.
questions.answerZh: 瑪雅更在意把工作做好，而不是第一個完成。
questions.highlight: Maya cares more about doing the work well than about finishing first.

questions.prompt: The coach gives greater praise to effort than to natural talent.
questions.promptZh: 教練給予努力的讚賞多於天賦。
questions.answer: The coach praises effort more than natural talent.
questions.answerZh: 教練讚賞努力多於天賦。
questions.highlight: The coach praises effort more than natural talent.

questions.prompt: The hotline is used more frequently by older residents than by younger adults.
questions.promptZh: 年長居民使用熱線的頻率高於年輕成年人。
questions.answer: Older residents use the hotline more frequently than younger adults do.
questions.answerZh: 年長居民使用熱線的頻率高於年輕成年人。
questions.highlight: Older residents use the hotline more frequently than younger adults do.

questions.prompt: For good photographs with this camera, good lighting is a more important requirement than expensive equipment.
questions.promptZh: 使用這部相機拍攝好照片時，良好光線比昂貴器材更重要。
questions.answer: Good photographs with this camera depend more on good lighting than on expensive equipment.
questions.answerZh: 使用這部相機拍攝好照片時，良好光線比昂貴器材更加重要。
questions.highlight: Good photographs with this camera depend more on good lighting than on expensive equipment.

questions.prompt: People often forget long lists of facts. Personal stories remain in their memory more easily.
questions.promptZh: 人們經常忘記一長串事實，但個人故事較容易留在記憶中。
questions.answer: People remember personal stories more easily than long lists of facts.
questions.answerZh: 人們記住個人故事通常比記住一長串事實容易。
questions.highlight: People remember personal stories more easily than long lists of facts.

questions.prompt: The amount of staff time saved by the new system is greater than the amount saved by the old one.
questions.promptZh: 新系統為員工節省的時間比舊系統多。
questions.answer: The new system saves staff more time than the old one.
questions.answerZh: 新系統為員工節省的時間比舊系統多。
questions.highlight: The new system saves staff more time than the old one.

questions.prompt: The school’s decoration budget is smaller than its budget for learning materials.
questions.promptZh: 學校的裝飾預算低於學習材料預算。
questions.answer: The school spends less on decoration than on learning materials.
questions.answerZh: 學校花在裝飾上的金錢少於學習材料。
questions.highlight: The school spends less on decoration than on learning materials.

questions.prompt: Clean streets bring greater benefits to our neighbourhood than large signs.
questions.promptZh: 整潔街道為我們的社區帶來的好處多於大型招牌。
questions.answer: Our neighbourhood benefits more from clean streets than from large signs.
questions.answerZh: 我們的社區從整潔街道得到的好處多於大型招牌。
questions.highlight: Our neighbourhood benefits more from clean streets than from large signs.

questions.prompt: The patient is afraid of both the operation and the long recovery. The recovery causes greater fear.
questions.promptZh: 病人既害怕手術，也害怕漫長的康復期，但康復期令他更加害怕。
questions.answer: The patient fears the long recovery more than the operation.
questions.answerZh: 病人害怕漫長的康復期多於手術。
questions.highlight: The patient fears the long recovery more than the operation.

questions.prompt: Examples remain clearer in students’ memories than definitions.
questions.promptZh: 與定義相比，例子更清楚地留在學生的記憶中。
questions.answer: Students remember examples more clearly than definitions.
questions.answerZh: 學生對例子的記憶比對定義的記憶更清楚。
questions.highlight: Students remember examples more clearly than definitions.

questions.prompt: Frontline workers receive greater attention from the organisation than outside consultants.
questions.promptZh: 機構給予前線員工的關注多於外部顧問。
questions.answer: The organisation listens more to frontline workers than to outside consultants.
questions.answerZh: 機構聽取前線員工的意見多於外部顧問的意見。
questions.highlight: The organisation listens more to frontline workers than to outside consultants.

questions.prompt: The plan’s results should carry greater weight in our judgement than its promises.
questions.promptZh: 我們判斷這個計劃時，其實際結果應比承諾佔更大比重。
questions.answer: We should judge the plan more by its results than by its promises.
questions.answerZh: 我們判斷這個計劃時，應較重視實際結果，而不是承諾。
questions.highlight: We should judge the plan more by its results than by its promises.

questions.prompt: During the school term, the library is used more frequently by local families than by tourists.
questions.promptZh: 在學期期間，本地家庭使用圖書館的頻率高於旅客。
questions.answer: During the school term, local families use the library more frequently than tourists do.
questions.answerZh: 在學期期間，本地家庭使用圖書館的頻率高於旅客。
questions.highlight: During the school term, local families use the library more frequently than tourists do.

questions.prompt: Which method is more helpful for my learning: solving problems or memorising rules? Solving problems is.
questions.promptZh: 哪一種方法對我的學習更有幫助：解決問題還是背誦規則？答案是解決問題。
questions.answer: Solving problems helps me more than memorising rules.
questions.answerZh: 解決問題對我的幫助比背誦規則更大。
questions.highlight: Solving problems helps me more than memorising rules.

questions.prompt: Reliable progress is more valuable to the manager than impressive promises.
questions.promptZh: 對經理而言，可靠的進展比動聽的承諾更有價值。
questions.answer: The manager values reliable progress more than impressive promises.
questions.answerZh: 經理重視可靠的進展多於動聽的承諾。
questions.highlight: The manager values reliable progress more than impressive promises.

questions.prompt: The hospital’s dependence on paper records is now lower than it was before the digital system was introduced.
questions.promptZh: 醫院目前對紙本紀錄的依賴程度低於引入數碼系統之前。
questions.answer: The hospital now relies less on paper records than it did before the digital system was introduced.
questions.answerZh: 醫院目前對紙本紀錄的依賴少於引入數碼系統之前。
questions.highlight: The hospital now relies less on paper records than it did before the digital system was introduced.

questions.prompt: When budgets are tight, basic needs receive greater priority from families than entertainment.
questions.promptZh: 當預算緊張時，家庭給予基本需要的優先程度高於娛樂。
questions.answer: When budgets are tight, families prioritise basic needs more than entertainment.
questions.answerZh: 當預算緊張時，家庭重視基本需要多於娛樂。
questions.highlight: When budgets are tight, families prioritise basic needs more than entertainment.

questions.prompt: Repeatable results are more trustworthy to the research team than exciting claims without evidence.
questions.promptZh: 對研究團隊而言，可以重複驗證的結果比缺乏證據但令人興奮的說法更可信。
questions.answer: The research team trusts repeatable results more than exciting claims without evidence.
questions.answerZh: 研究團隊信任可以重複驗證的結果，多於缺乏證據但令人興奮的說法。
questions.highlight: The research team trusts repeatable results more than exciting claims without evidence.

questions.prompt: In difficult conversations, people’s intended meaning receives more of my attention than their exact choice of words.
questions.promptZh: 在困難的對話中，我較留意別人的真正意思，而不是他們選擇的確切字眼。
questions.answer: In difficult conversations, I pay more attention to what people mean than to the exact words they choose.
questions.answerZh: 在困難的對話中，我較留意別人的真正意思，而不是他們選擇的確切字眼。
questions.highlight: In difficult conversations, I pay more attention to what people mean than to the exact words they choose.

questions.prompt: Who receives greater help from the new timetable, part-time students or full-time students? Part-time students do.
questions.promptZh: 哪一類學生從新時間表得到較大幫助：兼讀制學生還是全日制學生？答案是兼讀制學生。
questions.answer: The new timetable helps part-time students more than full-time students.
questions.answerZh: 新時間表對兼讀制學生的幫助比對全日制學生更大。
questions.highlight: The new timetable helps part-time students more than full-time students.

questions.prompt: Consistent action is more important to public confidence than one successful announcement.
questions.promptZh: 對公眾信心而言，持續一致的行動比一次成功的公布更重要。
questions.answer: Public confidence depends more on consistent action than on one successful announcement.
questions.answerZh: 公眾信心依賴持續一致的行動，多於一次成功的公布。
questions.highlight: Public confidence depends more on consistent action than on one successful announcement.

questions.prompt: Preventing accidents deserves greater council investment than repairing damage afterwards.
questions.promptZh: 與事後修復損害相比，預防意外更值得議會投放資源。
questions.answer: The council should invest more in preventing accidents than in repairing damage afterwards.
questions.answerZh: 議會應投放較多資源預防意外，而不是事後修復損害。
questions.highlight: The council should invest more in preventing accidents than in repairing damage afterwards.

questions.prompt: For beginners, a clear example is usually more instructive than a long grammatical explanation.
questions.promptZh: 對初學者而言，清楚的例子通常比冗長的文法解釋更有教學成效。
questions.answer: A clear example often teaches beginners more effectively than a long grammatical explanation does.
questions.answerZh: 清楚的例子通常比冗長的文法解釋更有效地教導初學者。
questions.highlight: A clear example often teaches beginners more effectively than a long grammatical explanation does.

questions.prompt: Although technology can save time, good judgement remains more important than fast results in serious decisions.
questions.promptZh: 雖然科技可以節省時間，但在重大決定中，良好判斷仍比迅速得到結果更重要。
questions.answer: Although technology can save time, good judgement still matters more than fast results in serious decisions.
questions.answerZh: 雖然科技可以節省時間，但在重大決定中，良好判斷仍比迅速得到結果更重要。
questions.highlight: Although technology can save time, good judgement still matters more than fast results in serious decisions.

questions.prompt: For organisations, honest communication is a stronger foundation for trust than attractive advertising.
questions.promptZh: 對機構而言，坦誠溝通比吸引的廣告更能為信任奠定穩固基礎。
questions.answer: Organisations build trust more through honest communication than through attractive advertising.
questions.answerZh: 機構透過坦誠溝通建立的信任，多於透過吸引的廣告建立的信任。
questions.highlight: Organisations build trust more through honest communication than through attractive advertising.
